svg.title: Synalux POS — taUle merge
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for taUle merge. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Tap two tables to merge • Drag to rearrange • Long-press to edit
Server: Sarah W. (Table 3) — Marcus's items transferred to Sarah
Seats 1-4 from T3, seats 5-7 from T4
TABLES MERGED: T3+T4 — bump all stations
Tables 3 and 4 → Combined Order at Table 3
Split a merged table back into separate checks by seat group or by item. No items voided.
— Move entire order to different table
Merge: pos_tables.merged_from int[] tracks source tables. pos_orders.table_id updated to primary table. pos_table_merge_log records event.
KDS receives merge notification bump. Merged table shown as "T3+T4" on floor map with amber double-border.
Split back: new pos_orders created per original table, items split by source tag. No items voided — pure reassignment via
UPDATE pos_order_items SET table_id = ... audit logged. Seat assignments preserved via pos_order_items.seat_number column.
